title: Riftbone
description: A simple grave / remains mod to keep your items safe and ready for recovery
body:
# Riftbone
WARNING! Upgrading the mod between certain versions might be unsafe! Read changelog before updating!
A simple grave / remains mod to keep your items safe and ready for recovery

A partial rewrite of [Rift Realms Utility](https://modrinth.com/mod/riftrealmsutility) for 1.21.1
## Graves
- Spawned on death.
- Disappear after a few seconds if emptied.
- Right-click to open their inventory and take the items out.
- Shift-right-click to take all the items from the grave into the slots they were previously in. (Quick looting)
  - If the slot is filled, the item is placed in an empty one.
  - If the inventory is full, the item is dropped on the ground.
- Float in water and lava, and stay at -64 when falling into the void.
## Migration - ONLY WORKS ON v1.0.0
- Graves from [Rift Realms Utility](https://modrinth.com/mod/riftrealmsutility) automatically change themselves into Riftbone graves when they are loaded.
  - Rift Realm Utility should not be installed alongside Riftbone, if it ever becomes avaible on 1.21.1
## Gamerules
- `ownerOnlyLooting` : Allows only the owner of the grave to open the grave, by either method. Defaults to false.
- `ownerOnlyQuickLooting` : Allows only the owner of the grave to instantly loot the grave, by Shift-right-clicking. Defaults to true.
- `quickLootingAllowed` : Allows quick looting to happen. Defaults to true.
